title: Byzuch 2
overview: Silesians are going to Germany for a return visit! Jorg and Andreas will be forced to put Gienek, Jurek, Marzena, Irek and Maryjan's colorful father… In Poland remain the neighbors, Grejta and Jerzy, who guard the household and dogs. A former churchman becomes the new mayor and has trouble making various decisions, and his mentor Fr. Maryjan is in Germany for a week. Maybe the new churchman will help the mayor.
